title: Get Started with Unreal Engine
creator: Epic Games
description: Epic's official entry point for installing Unreal Engine and learning projects, actors, levels, Blueprints, C++, packaging, and editor workflows.
useful: The safest starting map for a large documentation set that can otherwise be difficult to navigate.
audience: New Unreal Engine users who need an official map of the editor, Blueprints, C++, and packaging.
learning: Understand projects, actors, levels, and assets
Locate Blueprint and C++ learning paths
Move from installation to a packaged project
